min_net_return_pct.title: Minimum Net Return %
min_net_return_pct.description: Minimum net basket return after fees. 0 = pure arbitrage only. Negative includes EV+ opportunities slightly below breakeven.

min_signal_score.title: Minimum Signal Score
min_signal_score.description: 0–100 confidence score required to include an opportunity.

min_event_liquidity_usd.title: Minimum Event Liquidity (USD)
min_event_liquidity_usd.description: Skip events whose total cumulative liquidity is below this.

min_liquidity_per_leg_usd.title: Minimum Liquidity Per Leg (USD)
min_liquidity_per_leg_usd.description: Each child market (leg) must have at least this liquidity. Filters dead placeholder candidates.

min_legs_per_event.title: Minimum Legs Per Event
min_legs_per_event.description: Events with fewer mutually-exclusive legs than this are skipped.

liquidity_test_amount_usd.title: Liquidity Test Size (USD)
liquidity_test_amount_usd.description: Per-leg position size for the order book depth test. Sets the fillable threshold.

max_days_to_resolution.title: Max Days to Resolution
max_days_to_resolution.description: Skip events whose latest child resolves beyond this horizon.

max_events_to_scan.title: Max Events to Scan
max_events_to_scan.description: Cap on Polymarket events fetched per run. Higher = wider coverage, slower.

output_limit.title: Max Opportunities in Output
output_limit.description: Cap on opportunities returned per run.
